title: ZLAR Receipt v1 Payload
description: The governance fields inside a v1 receipt envelope. This JSON is canonicalized per ZLAR Canonicalization Spec v1.0, then base64url-encoded into the envelope's 'payload' field.

tool.description: Tool name as received by the gate (e.g., Bash, Edit, Write).

domain.description: Policy domain classification (e.g., file, network, bash, mcp).

detail_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical detail object. Proves what action was governed without leaking specifics.

ts.description: Decision timestamp. ISO 8601 UTC, always 3 decimal places (e.g., 2026-04-06T14:00:00.000Z).

policy_version.description: Version of the policy that was evaluated.

manifest_agent_id.description: Agent identity from the manifest, or null.

manifest_principal.description: Human principal accountable for the agent, or null.

delegation_chain.description: Delegation chain. Empty array if no delegation.

audit_event_id.description: ID of the source audit trail entry.

audit_prev_hash.description: prev_hash from the audit entry. Anchors receipt to the hash chain.
